description: Returns brands whose oldest current passenger car was first registered earliest, with debut year and current count. Use for longest-history or heritage-brand questions. Requires at least 100 current cars.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | STATS first_registered_year = MIN(_foerste_registrering_aar), current_count = COUNT(*) WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret", all_time_count = COUNT(*) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | WHERE current_count >= 100 AND brand IS NOT NULL AND first_registered_year IS NOT NULL AND first_registered_year >= 1900 | SORT first_registered_year ASC | LIMIT 25
